hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire-agent-etch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire-agent-etch post_tool_use'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire-agent-etch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire-agent-etch pre_tool_use'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire-agent-etch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire-agent-etch session_end'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire-agent-etch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire-agent-etch session_start'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire-agent-etch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire-agent-etch user_prompt_submit'
